hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(c));const f=j.file_path||j.path||'';if(/\.env(\..*)?$/.test(f)){console.error('BLOCKED: .env files contain live secrets. Edit manually.');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}});"
